entity.label: Abiel (Arbathite)
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: An Arbathite, one of David’s warriors (1 Chr. 11:32); called also Abi-albon (2 Sam. 23:31).

nodes.label: Abiel (Arbathite)
nodes.description: An Arbathite, one of David’s warriors (1 Chr. 11:32); called also Abi-albon (2 Sam. 23:31).

verses.text: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,
